Input: "sexual,religious,threat"
Step 1: Split 
-> ["sexual", "religious", "threat"]

Step 2: Lookup priorities sexual -> rank 2 
religious -> rank 3
threat -> rank 1 
Step 3: Select highest (rank 1)
-> "threat"

Output: "threat"
" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="280" width="280" x="600" y="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="S9JY40Ih1nHmHktCQiqw-28" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;arcSize=8;fillColor=#FAFAFA;strokeColor=#C9A84C;strokeWidth=2;fontColor=#2D2D3D;fontSize=14;fontStyle=0;fontFamily=Consolas;align=left;spacingLeft=12;spacingTop=8;shadow=1;glass=1;" value="EXAMPLE 2 (v3 bug fix)
Input: "sexual,religious"
(BUG): religious (wrong: picked alphabetically)
(FIXED): sexual
 (correct: sexual > religious
 in priority)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="280" width="280" x="600" y="420" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="S9JY40Ih1nHmHktCQiqw-30" parent="1" Label consolidation flowchart. Compound labels (e.g. "sexual,religious,threat") are split and resolved via priority lookup. The v3 fix corrected a bug where "sexual,religious" was incorrectly mapped to "religious" instead of "sexual"." vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="800" x="150" y="820" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(249, 249, 249), rgb(23, 23, 23)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(204, 204, 204), rgb(62, 62, 62));

div.div:
WORKED EXAMPLE
Input: "sexual,religious,threat"
Step 1: Split
-> ["sexual", "religious", "threat"]
Step 2: Lookup priorities sexual -> rank 2
religious -> rank 3
threat -> rank 1
Step 3: Select highest (rank 1)
-> "threat"
Output: "threat"

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(250, 250, 250), rgb(22, 22, 22)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(201, 168, 76), rgb(121, 92, 13));

div.div:
EXAMPLE 2 (v3 bug fix)
Input: "sexual,religious"
(BUG): religious (wrong: picked alphabetically)
(FIXED): sexual
(correct: sexual > religious
in priority)

div.div: Figure D4. Label consolidation flowchart. Compound labels (e.g. "sexual,religious,threat") are split and resolved via priority lookup. The v3 fix corrected a bug where "sexual,religious" was incorrectly mapped to "religious" instead of "sexual".
